schedule.bio: Hollywood Mannequin is a two-piece dance rock band that plays with original self produced backing tracks, which adds electronic elements to their live set.

his band has been Defining Highness since 2013. Keepers of the ancient and mysterious arts of ROCK AND ROLL!
On the bass, a man of LOW FREQUENCIES and HIGH CHARACTER, JAMES EGER! (also in @lakehorsemusic )
The heartbeat, the drummer, CLEAN ENERGY! JON COALE!
Tickling the organ like a surgeon with the name of a popstar, RYAN PARADISE!
And on guitar, the only man the devil has given a full refund to, NICK KURTH!
